stemHtml: Refer to E(LO)2 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. An aircraft is flying overhead RNAV point SHAPP (N54° 30'00'', W002° 37'38'') and has a relative bearing of 282° to CARLISLE NDB (328 CL, N54° 56'25'', W002° 48'20''). What is the magnetic heading of the aircraft, if the magnetic variation is 2° W at CL NDB?
